creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Limited edition Toy Story Cinnamon Rolls to try in London 🍰🧸

4 delicious flavours include:
🍪 Galactic Glaze with cookies & cream
🫐 To Infinity & Beyond with blueberry compote
🥜 The Roundup with peanut butter & pretzel
🍓 Rodeo Jam with mixed berry

🤍 Plus their classic vanilla roll too

📆19th until 21st of June (times available on @rollboysldn)
📍Roll Boys, 141 Commercial St, E1 6BJ

#london #toystory #Shoreditch #londoners

transcription.text: You've got a friend in me, you've got a friend in me.
